parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM offers WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days') AS offres_7j,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM offers WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days' AND status = 'new') AS nouvelles_7j,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM offers WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days' AND status = 'applied') AS postulees_7j,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM offers WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days' AND status = 'ignored') AS ignorees_7j,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM applications) AS cand_total,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM applications WHERE response_at IS NOT NULL) AS reponses,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM applications WHERE status = 'interview') AS entretiens,
  (SELECT coalesce(json_agg(r), '[]'::json) FROM (
     SELECT poste, entreprise, (extract(epoch FROM (now() - applied_at)) / 86400)::int AS jours
     FROM applications
     WHERE status = 'sent' AND response_at IS NULL
       AND applied_at <= now() - interval '7 days'
       AND (reminded_at IS NULL OR reminded_at <= now() - interval '7 days')
     ORDER BY applied_at ASC LIMIT 5) r) AS relances;

meta.note: Digest hebdomadaire (dimanche 18h) sur le canal jobs-alerts : offres collectées/triées/postulées/ignorées de la semaine, totaux candidatures (réponses, entretiens) et top 5 des candidatures à relancer (statut sent, sans réponse depuis plus de 7 jours, non relancées récemment). Lecture seule (aucune écriture en base). credential Postgres à associer (REMPLACER), workflow à ACTIVER après import.
